turtle.name: Turtle
turtle.description: Adds a high damage-mitigating shield to your back.

reactive.name: Reactive
reactive.description: When HEALTH drops below 10%, nearby enemies are stunned for a short time.

retaliator.name: Retaliator
retaliator.description: Deal bonus DAMAGE when your HEALTH is low.

endurance.name: Endurance
endurance.description: Chance for incoming damage to be severly reduced.
